text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although we lost the Unity Cup, the hard fight
our team put up helped open Riko Kashimoto's
eyes and save her and her team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa thanks us for our efforts. I vow
that <chrname> and I will continue to
do our best.
